description:
The Documents tab uses a plain `<Textarea>` for document content, but `ProjectDocument.content` is typed as HTML from TipTap. The content field is described as rich text throughout the type system but the editor doesn't support it.

**What to do:**
- Replace the `<Textarea>` in `DocumentsTab` with the TipTap editor already used elsewhere in the app (check `apps/ui/src/components/` for existing TipTap usage to reuse the same instance)
- Preserve the existing 1s debounced auto-save behavior
- Ensure HTML content round-trips correctly (load from API → render in editor → save back)

**Files to touch:**
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/projects-view/tabs/documents-tab.tsx`
title: Project page: replace Documents tab Textarea with TipTap rich text editor
